ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of university (public or private) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the university's ranking page */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the university (small, medium, large) */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "ranking_region" TEXT /* Region of the university for ranking purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the metric belongs to */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score of the university */,
  "teaching_score" REAL /* Teaching score of the university */,
  "research_score" REAL /* Research score of the university */,
  "industry_income_score" REAL /* Industry income score of the university */,
  "international_outlook_score" REAL /* International outlook score of the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metric_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score of the university */,
  "teaching_score" REAL /* Teaching score of the university */,
  "research_score" REAL /* Research score of the university */,
  "industry_income_score" REAL /* Industry income score of the university */,
  "international_outlook_score" REAL /* International outlook score of the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metric_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the demographic belongs to */,
  "female_male_ratio" TEXT /* Female to male student ratio */,
  "number_students" INTEGER /* Number of students */,
  "pc_intl_students" REAL /* Percentage of international students */,
  "student_staff_ratio" REAL /* Student to staff ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographic_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic */,
  "female_male_ratio" TEXT /* Female to male student ratio */,
  "number_students" INTEGER /* Number of students */,
  "pc_intl_students" REAL /* Percentage of international students */,
  "student_staff_ratio" REAL /* Student to staff ratio */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographic_history_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES student_demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the faculty member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects_offered" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the subject belongs to */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_offered_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the user (read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
